text: Aakash's work with Mark Eastwood and Fayyaz Minhas, on TIAgent has been accepted for a poster presentation at ECDP 2026.
Aakash presented his work on TIAgent at WPCCS 2026
Aakash began his PhD in Computer Science at the University of Warwick.
Aakash successfully defended his MSc thesis studying the controlled synthesis of high-resolution histopathology images.
Aakash achieved a distinction in his master's degree at the University of Birmingham.
Aakash's work on a high-resolution oral cancer image dataset was published at (Nature).
